backend/main.mo: Main actor for the ICP backend that includes blob storage, defines Game and Show types, and hardcodes arrays of 6 unblocked games and multiple TV shows with embed/thumbnail URLs.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining old/new actor shapes for Game and Show types; the run function returns empty arrays as a no-op migration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three implemented features: site rebranding to 'zakariasadeq7site123', updating the Games section with unblocked games, and updating the Shows section with popular TV shows, each mapped to affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to one-line summaries describing each component's purpose, used as a build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines OKLCH-based CSS color tokens for both light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with the page title and meta description set to 'zakariasadeq7site123', loading the React app via Vite.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes Navigation, HeroSection, ProxySection, GamesSection, ShowsSection, and Footer into a single-page layout with anchor-based section IDs.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying 'zakariasadeq7site123' branding, section navigation links, a caffeine.ai attribution link, and a dynamic copyright year.
frontend/src/components/GameCard.tsx: Game card component showing a thumbnail or emoji fallback, title, description, hover play overlay, and a neon-green styled 'Play Now' button.
frontend/src/components/GamePlayer.tsx: Full-screen modal that embeds a game in a sandboxed iframe with a header showing the game title, open-in-new-tab button, and Escape-to-close functionality.
frontend/src/components/GamesSection.tsx: Displays a grid of unblocked browser games by merging backend-fetched games with a hardcoded fallback list, and renders a GamePlayer modal when a game is selected.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a logo, headline, tagline, and three CTA buttons (Proxy, Games, Shows) that smooth-scroll to their respective page sections.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware active section highlighting and a responsive mobile menu for the Proxy, Games, and Shows links.
frontend/src/components/ProxySection.tsx: Web proxy section with a URL input bar that loads the entered URL in an embedded iframe, with refresh and clear controls.
frontend/src/components/ShowCard.tsx: Card component for a TV show that displays a thumbnail (or emoji fallback), title, description, and a Watch Now button that triggers a parent-provided callback.
frontend/src/components/ShowsSection.tsx: Displays a grid of TV shows by merging backend data with a hardcoded fallback list of popular shows (with YouTube trailer embeds), and opens a VideoPlayer modal on selection.
frontend/src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx: A fullscreen modal video player component that embeds a show's URL in an iframe, with close (Esc key or button) and open-in-new-tab controls, plus an optional description footer.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports two React Query hooks, useGetAllGames and useGetAllShows, that fetch game and show data from the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, configures Tailwind layers, defines OKLCH-based dark-mode CSS custom properties (including neon accent tokens), and adds hero gradient and grid pattern utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH color tokens, neon accent colors, custom border radii, neon box shadows, accordion keyframes, and registering typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the current version, feature list, and architectural notes for the zakariasadeq7site123 site, which includes a web proxy, unblocked games, and TV show streaming sections.
